title: improved spears
description: The resource pack replaces the model and texture of the spears, and also changes their position in the hand in first person
body:
![improved spears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2927f8f03e4e18d0b58de3de2151dad381bfbbc.png)

# ![the strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cb24af972c703b54f4f1d0ac6f34096e57fc316.png) **description!**

**The resource pack changes the model and texture of the spears, but keeps the original look of the model, only slightly adding details, which is clearly visible.**

**The resource pack also changes the position in the hand, making the spear bigger and longer. In addition, when using the spear, its position is now shifted toward the center, which should improve ease of use.**

**Also, some spears are slightly different, namely the wooden and netherite spear, but only a little.**
![poloska](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb5a23d9aa754e615f86d589eabaa7b45adfb964.png)
## ![snac](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e04e89260b8b6a17f20a2a80493dfb3a81169b1.png) **what's he doing!**
- Changes the model of the spears
- Changes the texture of the spears
- Changes the position in the hand, and the way the spear is used

![poloska red](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbfe25557393799a58b6587cede25b2183f5a5c5.png)
![the strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0076017f3f98f4a5045a198ed3fb213ab7d60ca8.png)
